summary: A real GitHub Retry-After exceeded Symphony's internal backoff ceiling; manual audit metadata exposed incorrect UTC handling; and post-merge installation showed that a shell-wrapper timeout can leave its child gate running and that systemd active precedes dashboard readiness.
action: Keep provider guidance authoritative with bounded positive jitter; capture timestamps automatically in UTC; reject future/reversed timelines; make Attempt boundaries create-once; supervise complete command process trees; and verify listening port plus HTTP readiness rather than accepting systemd active alone.
